news.t: PurePlay ETFs Makes Debut with the PurePlay NVIDIA Ecosystem Picks & Shovels Index ETF, the First ETF Designed to Track the NVIDIA Value Chain

holdings.infoBox: NVPS is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings. The top holdings are SK Hynix Inc DR stock at 13.02%, Micron Technology at 10.01%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 6.40%, Vertiv Holdings Co at 5.48%, and Marvell Technology at 4.12%.

overview.description: The PurePlay Nvidia Ecosystem Picks & Shovels Index ETF (NVPS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks an index of companies that support NVIDIA Corp.s (NASDAQ: NVDA) supply chain. The fund invests in companies from developed markets, plus Korea and Taiwan, weighted according to business operations and involvement. NVPS was launched on Jun 18, 2026 and is issued by PurePlay.
infoTable: Solactive Nvidia Ecosystem Picks & Shovels Index

data.title: PurePlay ETFs Makes Debut with the PurePlay NVIDIA Ecosystem Picks & Shovels Index ETF, the First ETF Designed to Track the NVIDIA Value Chain
data.text: DETROIT--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PurePlay ETFs, a thematic ETF issuer, today announced the launch of the PurePlay NVIDIA Ecosystem Picks & Shovels Index ETF (Nasdaq: NVPS), the first ETF in the US market des...
